events.content: Ported world-model-diagnostic skill from upstream OpenClaw catalog. Stripped OpenClaw branding (author, version suffix, metadata.openclaw block). Replaced lily-memory/memory_search/memory_store with Serena/Forgetful per AGENTS.md and ADR-007. Replaced ~/.openclaw/workspace/diagnostics path with .agents/analysis/diagnostics/. Reset version to 1.0.0. Frontmatter validates; size 293 lines (within 500). Companion skills referenced as in-flight issues (#1802, #1803, #1806) per issue scope.

PR review follow-up: shortened description to 183 chars, fixed Phase 1 memory query sequence, added memory tooling fallback, added output self-check gate, added Verification section. Created eval suite (6 knowledge-integration prompts + 6 behavioral scenarios). Ran SkillForge analysis.
